ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "epoch_ms" TEXT /* Epoch time in milliseconds */,
  "time_utc" TEXT /* Time in UTC format */,
  "elapsed_seconds" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds since the start of the data collection session */,
  "x_axis_t" REAL /* X-axis temperature reading */,
  "y_axis_t" REAL /* Y-axis temperature reading */,
  "z_axis_t" REAL /* Z-axis temperature reading */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data point (for tracking changes over time) */,
  "sensor_value" REAL /* The actual sensor reading */,
  "sensor_value_unit" TEXT /* The unit of the sensor value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* The quality metric or flag of the data */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data point is an anomaly */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the data point was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine the sensor is installed on */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the machine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the sensor should be calibrated (in days) */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the sensor should be maintained (in days) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor is due for maintenance */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the sensor record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the sensor record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the sensor record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the sensor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., Temperature, Pressure, Vibration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the sensor */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the sensor type record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the sensor type record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the sensor type record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the sensor type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "factory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the factory the production line is in */,
  "production_capacity" REAL /* Production capacity of the line */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the production line (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date the production line started operations */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date the production line stopped operations (if applicable) */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date the production line was last audited */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the production line record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the production line record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the production line record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the production line record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_lines_factory_id FOREIGN KEY ("factory_id") REFERENCES factories ("factory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factories" (
  "factory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factory */,
  "factory_name" TEXT /* Name of the factory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the factory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the factory */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the factory (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the factory was established */,
  "last_inspected_date" TEXT /* Date the factory was last inspected */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the factory record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the factory record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the factory record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the factory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the access log record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the role record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the role record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the role record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the permission record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the permission record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the permission record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the user-role mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the user-role mapping */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the role-permission mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Who last updated the role-permission mapping */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the role-permission mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
